# Dev Journey — Full Stack & Multi-Language Development Classes

> Dev Journey is a free, beginner-friendly coding course by Chebon Kelvin Kibet,
> a freelance full stack engineer. It teaches JavaScript, Python, React, Next.js,
> Node.js, PostgreSQL, Flutter and PHP step by step using playful, real-world
> analogies and runnable code examples, aimed at complete beginners.

Website: https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app
Author: Chebon Kelvin Kibet — https://chebonkelvin.com
Contact: contact@chebonkelvin.com

## Courses

- [JavaScript Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/javascript.html):
  Variables, data types, operators, string methods, template literals, if/else,
  switch statements, loops, functions, arrow functions, arrays and array methods.

- [React Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/react.html):
  What React is, JSX, functional components, props, useState, useEffect,
  lists & keys, conditional rendering, forms, useContext, useRef,
  useMemo and useCallback.

- [Next.js Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/nextjs.html):
  What Next.js is, file-based routing, pages & layouts, server vs client
  components, data fetching (SSR), static generation (SSG), API routes,
  dynamic routes & params, image optimization and metadata.

- [Node.js Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/nodejs.html):
  What Node.js is, modules, file system, HTTP servers, Express.js, routing,
  middleware, REST APIs, JWT authentication, environment variables, CORS
  and error handling.

- [PostgreSQL Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/postgres.html):
  What PostgreSQL is, hosting on Railway, tables & columns, data types,
  INSERT, SELECT, WHERE, UPDATE, DELETE, primary & foreign keys, JOINs,
  GROUP BY and aggregates.

- [Python Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/python.html):
  Variables, data types, lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries, conditionals, loops,
  functions, lambdas, comprehensions, classes & OOP, error handling, file
  handling, decorators and JSON. Code examples run live in the browser via
  Pyodide.

- [Flutter Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/flutter.html):
  What Flutter is, Dart basics, stateless vs stateful widgets, layouts, state
  management with setState, user input, navigation, lists, forms, async/await,
  HTTP requests and the Provider package.

- [PHP Tutorial](https://fullstackclassesforchebon.web.app/php.html):
  Variables, data types, arrays, conditionals, loops, functions, superglobals,
  forms, sessions & cookies, include/require, OOP, error handling and
  connecting to a database with PDO.

## Teaching Style

Every lesson explains one concept with a simple everyday analogy (e.g. variables
as "magic boxes", middleware as "assembly line workers"), followed by small,
focused, runnable code examples (one per key point) rather than long blocks.
Lessons are ordered so each builds on the previous one, forming a complete
beginner-to-full-stack learning path.

## Recommended Learning Order

1. JavaScript (language fundamentals)
2. Python (language fundamentals, alternate track)
3. React (frontend UI)
4. Node.js (backend & APIs)
5. PHP (backend, alternate track)
6. PostgreSQL (databases & SQL)
7. Next.js (fullstack React framework)
8. Flutter (cross-platform mobile apps)
